name: Arjun Mehta
summary: Experienced backend engineer with 6 years building high-throughput payment systems at Razorpay. Expert in Python microservices, event-driven architectures with Kafka, and cloud-native deployments on AWS EKS.

name: Priya Sharma
summary: Backend developer at Flipkart working on catalog and inventory microservices. Strong in Python and Django with hands-on experience in distributed systems and asynchronous task processing with Celery.

name: Rahul Krishnan
summary: Engineering lead at CRED managing a team of 8 building rewards and payments infrastructure. Deep expertise in system design, distributed computing, and platform engineering with Python and Go.

name: Sneha Patel
summary: Full-stack developer at Swiggy working on consumer-facing features. Proficient in React and Node.js for frontend/backend, with growing Python skills and a keen interest in backend-heavy roles.

name: Vikram Desai
education: M.S. Computer Science, Carnegie Mellon University
summary: ML engineer building recommendation systems at Myntra. Strong Python and ML framework expertise, with production experience deploying models via FastAPI microservices on AWS.

name: Ananya Iyer
education: B.Tech Computer Science, PSG Tech Coimbatore
summary: Junior backend developer at Zoho building CRM modules in Java and Spring Boot. Eager to transition to Python-based roles and expand cloud computing skills. Quick learner with solid CS fundamentals.

name: Karthik Nair
summary: DevOps engineer at Freshworks specializing in cloud infrastructure automation and CI/CD pipelines. Strong in AWS, Kubernetes, and IaC with Terraform. Has Python scripting experience but not application development.

name: Meera Joshi
summary: Senior backend engineer at PhonePe working on payment gateway services processing millions of transactions daily. Expert in Python, FastAPI, and building highly available distributed systems.

name: Aditya Verma
summary: Frontend engineer at Atlassian building Jira's next-gen UI. Deep expertise in React, TypeScript, and design systems. Currently not looking for a switch but open to exceptional opportunities.

name: Deepika Reddy
summary: Data engineer at Walmart Labs building large-scale ETL pipelines and real-time streaming systems. Strong in Python, Spark, and Kafka with solid SQL and database knowledge.

name: Rohan Gupta
summary: Software engineer at Google working on Cloud Spanner infrastructure. Strong algorithmic skills and systems programming in C++ and Go. Limited web framework experience but excellent CS fundamentals.

name: Nisha Agarwal
summary: Junior developer at Infosys working on enterprise Java applications. Recently graduated with foundational skills in web development. Looking to move into a product-based company.

name: Siddharth Menon
summary: Backend engineer at Zerodha building trading platform APIs handling lakhs of concurrent users. Strong in Python, Django, PostgreSQL, and performance optimization for low-latency systems.

name: Tanvi Bhatt
summary: Platform engineer at Razorpay building internal developer tools and API gateways. Expert in Python microservices with FastAPI, Kubernetes orchestration, and cloud-native infrastructure on AWS.

name: Amit Saxena
summary: Technical lead at TCS Digital managing enterprise banking solutions. 10+ years in Java/Spring Boot ecosystems. Looking to transition to a product startup but has limited Python and modern cloud-native experience.

name: Pooja Kulkarni
education: B.Tech IT, College of Engineering Pune
summary: Backend developer at Slice (fintech) building credit card management APIs. Hands-on with Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL in a fintech context. Eager to take on more complex system design challenges.

name: Harsh Vardhan
summary: SDE-2 at Amazon working on logistics and supply chain microservices. Strong in Java and Python with deep AWS expertise. Experienced in building services at massive scale with DynamoDB and SQS.

name: Riya Chatterjee
summary: AI researcher at Microsoft Research focusing on NLP and large language models. Strong Python and deep learning skills with some backend experience via FastAPI. Currently pursuing Ph.D. at IISc.

name: Manish Tiwari
education: B.Tech Computer Science, Manipal Institute of Technology
summary: Backend engineer at Paytm working on wallet and payments services. Strong in Python, Django, and message queue systems. Experience with high-availability fintech systems processing millions of daily transactions.

name: Lakshmi Sundaram
summary: Senior data analyst at Fractal Analytics with 7 years of experience in business intelligence and data visualization. Strong analytical skills but limited software engineering and backend development experience.
